title: Filipino-Style Menudo Keto Casserole
description: A keto twist on the classic Filipino menudo dish, transformed into a hearty casserole with a crunchy piquant topping.
instructions: In a pan, heat vegetable oil over medium heat. Add menudo and cook until lightly browned.
In a separate bowl, mix fluffy cheese with salt.
In a 9x13 inch baking dish, create a layer of cooked menudo.
Top the menudo layer with the fluffy cheese mixture.
Sprinkle piquant on top of the cheese layer.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
